name: SomaticMutation
what_it_solves: Layer-0 Pydantic/dataclass contract carried by every engine boundary that references SomaticMutation.
how_it_solves: Fields (canonical set): ['gene', 'hgvs_p', 'consequence', 'allele_frequency', 'zygosity']. See CRISPRO_SL_PHD_ROADMAP.txt Ch 3.2 for the exact schema.
why_it_exists: Typed representation prevents an engine from silently accepting free-text mutation notes.
